items.title_en: Fans overcharged by $1.72 each by 'monopoly' Ticketmaster owner
items.title_zh: “垄断”Ticketmaster 所有者向每名粉丝多收 1.72 美元
items.desc_en: The lawsuit said the firm's practices had led to higher ticket prices and worse service for customers.
items.desc_zh: 诉讼称，该公司的做法导致票价上涨和客户服务恶化。

items.title_en: Cattle prices soar to record highs as grilling season heats up
items.title_zh: 随着烧烤季节的升温，牛肉价格飙升至历史新高
items.desc_en: Cattle futures contracts have jumped more than 25% over the past 12 months as ranchers face rising costs and cut the size of herds.
items.desc_zh: 由于牧场主面临成本上涨和减少牛群规模，过去 12 个月牛期货合约上涨了 25% 以上。

items.title_en: Ford EV leader leaving automaker amid new restructuring efforts
items.title_zh: 福特电动汽车领导者在新的重组努力中离开汽车制造商
items.desc_en: The departure was announced alongside Ford detailing a new restructuring that includes the establishment of a "Product Creation and Industrialization" unit.
items.desc_zh: 福特宣布离职的同时，还详细介绍了新的重组计划，其中包括建立“产品创造和工业化”部门。

items.title_en: Lumen Technology's high-stakes fiber bet nearly bankrupted it. Now, it's powering its AI future
items.title_zh: Lumen Technology 的高风险光纤投资几乎使其破产。现在，它正在为人工智能的未来提供动力
items.desc_en: AI's voracious demand for computing power is putting Lumen Technologies in a sweet spot. The one-time penny stock could soar as data use surges.
items.desc_zh: 人工智能对计算能力的巨大需求使 Lumen Technologies 处于有利位置。随着数据使用量的激增，这种一次性低价股可能会飙升。

items.title_en: Regulators are reportedly zeroing in on suspicious trades ahead of market-moving Trump post
items.title_zh: 据报道，在特朗普发表影响市场的言论之前，监管机构正在重点关注可疑交易
items.desc_en: The information sought includes so-called Tag 50 identifiers, which can be used to determine who was behind the trades.
items.desc_zh: 寻求的信息包括所谓的 Tag 50 标识符，可用于确定交易背后的人员。

items.title_en: Iran war damaged as much as $58 billion of energy infrastructure, Rystad estimates
items.title_zh: Rystad 估计，伊朗战争对能源基础设施造成的损失高达 580 亿美元
items.desc_en: It could take years to repair damaged energy infrastructure in the Middle East and restore production to pre-war levels.
items.desc_zh: 修复中东受损的能源基础设施并将生产恢复到战前水平可能需要数年时间。

items.title_en: This derivative stock play on SpaceX could be setting up for another breakout, charts show
items.title_zh: 图表显示，SpaceX 的衍生品股票可能会迎来另一次突破
items.desc_en: EchoStar is seeing some head-turning price action, and a bullish chart pattern is emerging.
items.desc_zh: EchoStar 看到了一些令人头晕的价格走势，看涨的图表模式正在出现。

items.title_en: Amazon sellers boycott ads in policy change revolt: 'We're running out of f---ing margin'
items.title_zh: 亚马逊卖家抵制广告，抗议政策改变：“我们的利润快用完了”
items.desc_en: Hundreds of large Amazon sellers are boycotting its advertising platform on Wednesday to protest the policy changes.
items.desc_zh: 周三，数百名亚马逊大型卖家抵制其广告平台，以抗议政策变化。

items.title_zh: 官员称，以色列连续袭击黎巴嫩，造成三名护理人员死亡
items.desc_en: Lebanon's government condemns as a "flagrant crime" the killing of the paramedics, one of whom featured in a BBC report.
items.desc_zh: 黎巴嫩政府谴责杀害护理人员的行为是“公然犯罪”，英国广播公司 (BBC) 的一篇报道对其中一名护理人员进行了专题报道。

items.title_en: For cruise lines, Iran conflict and oil prices threaten to dent profits
items.title_zh: 对于邮轮公司来说，伊朗冲突和油价可能会削弱利润
items.desc_en: Even as the industry navigates choppy seas, cruise companies are looking for their next avenues for growth.
items.desc_zh: 尽管该行业在波涛汹涌的大海上航行，邮轮公司仍在寻找下一个增长途径。

items.title_zh: SantaCon 组织者被控从慈善串酒吧盗窃 100 万美元
items.desc_en: Prosecutors say Stefan Pildes spent hundreds of thousands of $2.7m raised for charity on personal expenses.
items.desc_zh: 检察官称，Stefan Pildes 将数十万慈善募集的 270 万美元用于个人开支。

items.title_zh: 白宫预算主管拉塞尔·沃特不会在证词中估计伊朗战争成本

items.desc_zh: 管理和预算办公室主任拉塞尔·沃特周三在众议院预算委员会作证。

items.title_en: Prominent Palestinian prisoner Marwan Barghouti assaulted three times in a month, family says
items.title_zh: 巴勒斯坦著名囚犯马尔万·巴尔古提 (Marwan Barghouti) 一个月内遭到三次袭击，家人称
items.desc_en: The Israeli Prison Service says the allegation that Barghouti was subjected to physical violence by prison guards are "false and baseless".
items.desc_zh: 以色列监狱管理局表示，有关巴尔古提遭受狱警身体暴力的指控是“错误且毫无根据的”。

items.title_en: Chinese national given one year in prison for smuggling ants out of Kenya
items.title_zh: 中国公民因从肯尼亚走私蚂蚁被判入狱一年
items.desc_en: Zhang Kequn was arrested in March while trying to travel to China with more than 2,000 live ants.
items.desc_zh: 张克群3月份在试图携带2000多只活蚂蚁前往中国时被捕。

items.title_en: Snapchat owner cuts 1,000 jobs as says AI will reduce repetitive work
items.title_zh: Snapchat 老板裁员 1000 人，称人工智能将减少重复性工作
items.desc_en: The Snapchat owner is laying off around 16% of staff and withdrawn hundreds of open job roles.
items.desc_zh: Snapchat 所有者将解雇约 16% 的员工，并撤回数百个空缺职位。

items.title_en: S&P 500 ticks higher as benchmark approaches all-time high: Live updates
items.title_zh: 随着基准接近历史高点，标准普尔 500 指数走高：实时更新
items.desc_en: The S&P 500 ended Tuesday's session less than 1% from its all-time high set on Jan. 28.
items.desc_zh: 标准普尔 500 指数周二收盘时较 1 月 28 日创下的历史高点下跌不到 1%。

items.title_en: Iran war 'very close to over,' Trump says — and the stock market 'is going to boom'
items.title_zh: 特朗普表示，伊朗战争“即将结束”，股市“将会繁荣”
items.desc_en: The U.S. has beaten Iran "militarily" and that the war is "very close to over," Trump said, claiming a peace deal likely.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普表示，美国已经在“军事上”击败了伊朗，战争“非常接近结束”，并声称很可能达成和平协议。

items.title_en: Struggling shoe retailer Allbirds makes bizarre pivot from shoes to AI, stock explodes more than 300%
items.title_zh: 陷入困境的鞋类零售商 Allbirds 奇异地从鞋子转向人工智能，股价暴涨超过 300%
items.desc_en: Allbirds announced a deal with American Exchange Group to sell its intellectual property and other assets for $39 million in March.
items.desc_zh: 3 月份，Allbirds 宣布与美国交易集团 (American Exchange Group) 达成协议，以 3900 万美元的价格出售其知识产权和其他资产。

items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁美联储主席鲍威尔，如果他五月份不离开就解雇他

items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普的威胁标志着他与杰罗姆·鲍威尔的持续争执的最新升级。

items.title_zh: 特朗普威胁称，如果鲍威尔不自行离任，他将解雇鲍威尔
items.desc_en: Though most Fed chairs in the past have left after being replaced, Powell has demurred on what he plans to do.
items.desc_zh: 尽管过去大多数美联储主席在被替换后都离开了，但鲍威尔对他的计划提出了异议。

items.title_en: Four killed in second Turkish school shooting in two days
items.title_zh: 土耳其两天内发生第二起校园枪击事件，四人死亡
items.desc_en: There has been no official confirmation of who has been killed or what has happened to the attacker.
items.desc_zh: 目前还没有官方确认谁被杀或袭击者发生了什么事。

items.title_zh: Booking.com 客户被黑客攻击后收到“预订劫持”警告

items.desc_zh: 该旅游平台表示，它已更改 Pin 图以保护客户，但未透露有多少人受到影响。

items.title_zh: 谷歌将惩罚利用后退按钮欺骗用户的网站

items.title_en: More than 200 Iranian sailors stranded after US torpedo attack return home
items.title_zh: 美军鱼雷袭击 200多名伊朗水手回国受困
items.desc_en: The survivors of the US attack on Iranian vessel Iris Dena, which claimed the lives of 104 people, were among those repatriated.

items.title_en: South Africa names apartheid-era politician as new ambassador to the US
items.title_zh: 南非任命种族隔离时代政治家为新驻美国大使
items.desc_en: Roelf Meyer played a key role as a negotiator during talks to end white-minority rule in South Africa.
items.desc_zh: 罗尔夫·迈耶在结束南非白人少数统治的谈判中作为谈判代表发挥了关键作用。

items.title_en: Magyar meets Hungarian president as Trump says next PM 'a good man'
items.title_zh: 马扎尔会见匈牙利总统，特朗普称下一任总理是“好人”
items.desc_en: The man who ended Viktor Orbán's 16 years of continuous rule, Péter Magyar, is calling for a speedy transfer of power.
items.desc_zh: 结束维克托·欧尔班 16 年连续统治的人彼得·马扎尔 (Péter Magyar) 呼吁迅速移交权力。

items.title_en: Kanye West postpones France gig until further notice
items.title_zh: 坎耶·维斯特 (Kanye West) 推迟法国演出，直至另行通知
items.desc_en: It comes a week after the UK announced it would block the rapper from entering the country, where he was due to headline a music festival in summer.
items.desc_zh: 一周前，英国宣布将阻止这位说唱歌手进入该国，他原定于夏季在英国的一场音乐节上担任主角。

items.title_en: Australia's richest person must share part of her mining fortunes, court rules
items.title_zh: 法院规定，澳大利亚首富必须分享部分矿业财富
items.desc_en: The long-running legal dispute is over a lucrative iron ore project in the top west corner of Australia.
items.desc_zh: 这场长期的法律纠纷是围绕澳大利亚西北部一个利润丰厚的铁矿石项目展开的。

items.title_en: South Korea jails American YouTuber for public nuisance
items.title_zh: 韩国因公共滋扰罪入狱美国 YouTuber
items.desc_en: Johnny Somali sparked outrage after kissing a statue representing World War Two sex slaves.
items.desc_zh: 约翰尼·索马里在亲吻代表第二次世界大战性奴隶的雕像后引发了愤怒。

items.title_en: 250 missing after migrant boat sinks in Indian Ocean
items.title_zh: 印度洋移民船沉没 250人失踪
items.desc_en: The trawler "reportedly sank due to heavy winds, rough seas and overcrowding", the United Nations said.
items.desc_zh: 联合国称，这艘拖网渔船“据报道因强风、波涛汹涌的海面和过度拥挤而沉没”。

items.title_en: Palantir defends its record as MPs demand more scrutiny of data use
items.title_zh: Palantir 捍卫其记录，国会议员要求对数据使用进行更多审查
items.desc_en: NHS guidance that all hospitals should be using Palantir software from this month has sparked a backlash.
items.desc_zh: NHS 指导从本月起所有医院都应使用 Palantir 软件，此举引发了强烈反对。

items.title_en: Man charged with attempted murder in attack on home of OpenAI's Sam Altman
items.title_zh: 一名男子被指控在袭击 OpenAI 萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 家时企图谋杀
items.desc_en: The Texas man, who also faces federal felony charges, allegedly had documents advocating for violence against AI executives.
items.desc_zh: 这名德克萨斯州男子还面临联邦重罪指控，据称他持有鼓吹对人工智能高管实施暴力的文件。

items.title_zh: 在家长对错误表示担忧后，Roblox 为扩大年龄检查辩护
items.desc_en: With 144m daily users, the gaming company is extending its tech to introduce two age‑specific accounts.
items.desc_zh: 该游戏公司拥有 1.44 亿每日用户，正在扩展其技术，推出两个特定年龄的帐户。

items.title_en: GTA-maker Rockstar Games hacked again but downplays impact
items.title_zh: GTA 制作商 Rockstar Games 再次遭到黑客攻击，但淡化影响
items.desc_en: The incident marks the second time the games giant has been hacked by young, English-speaking hackers.
items.desc_zh: 此次事件标志着这家游戏巨头第二次遭到年轻的英语黑客的攻击。

items.title_zh: OpenAI 老板萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 的家遭到燃烧弹攻击
